Title: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login screen
2. Enter the valid email and password
3. Tap the login button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home screen

Title: Verify user can register a new account
Test Data: Valid email, password, and personal information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration screen
2. Enter the required personal information
3. Enter a valid email and password
4. Tap the register button
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the login screen

Title: Verify user can create an object for rent
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create object screen
2. Enter the object details and rental price
3. Tap the create button
Expected Result: The object is successfully created and added to the user's inventory

Title: Verify user can request an object for rent
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are available objects to rent
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the object list screen
2. Select an object to rent
3. Tap the request button
Expected Result: The object is successfully requested and the user is notified of the request status

Title: Verify user can create a service
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create service screen
2. Enter the service details and price
3. Tap the create button
Expected Result: The service is successfully created and added to the user's services

Title: Verify user can request a service
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are available services to request
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the service list screen
2. Select a service to request
3. Tap the request button
Expected Result: The service is successfully requested and the user is notified of the request status

Title: Start Application
Preconditions: Application is installed on the smartphone.
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the application icon on the smartphone screen.
Expected Result: The application starts.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: Application is installed on the smartphone.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the registration/login screen.
2. Enter the required information (username, email, password).
3. Tap on the submit button.
Expected Result: The user profile is created successfully.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: Application is installed on the smartphone and the user has already registered.
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the registration/login screen.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Tap on the login button.
Expected Result: The user connects with success.

Title: Modify User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the profile modification option.
2. Enter the new email and password.
3. Tap on the save button.
Expected Result: The user's information is updated successfully.

Title: User Guide
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the user guide option.
Expected Result: The user is provided with the necessary information to use the application.

Title: Create Rentable Object
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the object creation option.
2. Enter the object details.
3. Tap on the save button.
Expected Result: The object is created and added to the user's catalog.

Title: Elimination of an object from rental
Preconditions:
Account created and logged in
An object in rental exists
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Elimina oggetto" button
Expected Result: The object is removed from the rental

Title: Request for an object in rental
Test Steps: 1. Click on the appropriate button to request an object in rental
Expected Result: The user chooses the object they want to rent

Title: Creation of a service
Test Steps: 1. Click on the button to add a service
Expected Result: The user can specify their availability for the service

Title: Elimination of a service
Preconditions:
Account created and logged in
The user has created a service they want to eliminate
Test Steps: 1. Click on the service elimination button
Expected Result: The service is eliminated

Title: Request for a service
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Richiedi servizio" button
Expected Result: The user requests a service from another user

Title: Creation of an announcement
Test Steps: 1. Click on the button for creating an announcement
Expected Result: The user can create an announcement for a service or an object they need

Title: Elimination of an announcement
Preconditions:
Account created and logged in
The user has created an announcement they want to eliminate
Test Steps: 1. Click on the announcement elimination button
Expected Result: The announcement is eliminated

Title: Logout
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Logout" button
Expected Result: The user logs out of the application

Title: Location Access
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the location access page
2. Select "Current Location" or "Enter Location"
Expected Result: User's location is updated or user can enter a location

Title: App Entry
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the app entry page
2. Select a section to access
Expected Result: User is taken to the selected section

Title: View Offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offers page
2. Verify that offers are displayed
Expected Result: Offers are displayed and can be filtered by category

Title: Search Offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the search page
2. Enter the search term
3. Click on the "Search" button
Expected Result: Relevant offers are displayed

Title: Post Offer
Test Data: Offer details (title, description, location, price, category, images)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offer posting page
2. Enter the offer details
3. Click on the "Post" button
Expected Result: Offer is posted and visible to other users

Title: Create Request
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the request creation page
2. Enter the request details
3. Click on the "Create" button
Expected Result: Request is created and visible to other users

Title: Contact
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the contact page
2. Verify that contact options are available
Expected Result: Contact options are available for users to communicate with each other

Title: View Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. Verify that user's information is displayed
Expected Result: User's information is displayed and can be edited by the user

Title: Edit Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. Edit user details
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: User details are updated

Title: Check Balance
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. Verify that the user's balance is displayed
Expected Result: User's balance is displayed correctly

Title: Account Cancellation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to account settings
2. Select 'Cancel Account' option
3. Confirm account cancellation
Expected Result: User account and related data are removed from the database, improving system performance.

Title: Application Disinstallation
Test Steps:
1. Access device settings
2. Select 'Applications' or 'Apps'
3. Find the application in the list
4. Select 'Uninstall' or 'Delete' option
Expected Result: Application data is automatically deleted from the device.

Title: Error Notification
Test Steps: 1. Perform an incorrect action in the application
Expected Result: User is notified with a user-friendly error message explaining the issue.

Title: Compatibility
Preconditions: Device is running Android version 6.0 or above
Test Steps: 1. Install the application on the device
Expected Result: Application is installed and runs without errors.

Title: Application Performance
Preconditions: Device has at least 200 MB of free memory
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Perform various actions within the application
Expected Result: Application responds within 4 seconds, providing a smooth and responsive user experience.

Title: User-Friendliness
Preconditions: User is interacting with the application
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to perform an action in the application
Expected Result: User can complete the action with a maximum of 3 incorrect attempts, indicating an intuitive and user-friendly interface.

Title: Robustness
Preconditions: User is interacting with the application
Test Steps: 1. Perform actions in the application that may require Firebase to respond
Expected Result: Responses from Firebase are received within 3 seconds, ensuring the application continues to function correctly even in the presence of errors or edge cases.

Title: Portability
Preconditions: Device is running Android version 6.0 or above
Test Steps: 1. Install the application on a compatible device
Expected Result: Application is installed and runs without errors, demonstrating the application's portability across Android devices.

Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the registration button
2. Enter the user's data, email, and password
3. Confirm the access to GPS
Expected Result: The system allows the user to access the application's functions

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the login button
2. Enter the email and password
Expected Result: The system allows the user to access the application's functions

Title: Check if the application is compatible with the required hardware
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on a smartphone.
2. Check the system requirements displayed on the application.
Expected Result: 1. The system requirements (Android 4.1 or later, 512 MB of RAM, 200 MB of free space, touch screen, internet connectivity) are displayed.

Title: Check if the application uses Firebase as its database
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Check the database being used in the application.
Expected Result: 1. Firebase is being used as the database.

Title: Check if the application is compatible with the optional geolocation feature
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on a smartphone with geolocation enabled.
2. Check if the application is able to access the geolocation data.
Expected Result: 1. The application is able to access the geolocation data.

Title: Check if the application is able to take photos
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on a smartphone with a camera.
2. Attempt to take a photo within the application.
Expected Result: 1. The application is able to take a photo.
